Operation 'manageFeedSubscription' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Added: authentication requirement (HTTP Basic Auth), required input fields from SubscriptionRequest schema, expected response behavior, and the side effect of enabling real-time notifications. This helps agents understand what parameters to provide and what state changes occur.

data.current_summary: Subscribe or unsubscribe from a feed
data.current_description: Subscribe to or unsubscribe from an RSS/Atom feed using the PubSubHubbub protocol.
data.description_suggestion: Subscribe to or unsubscribe from an RSS/Atom feed using the PubSubHubbub protocol. Requires authentication via HTTP Basic Auth. The SubscriptionRequest body must specify the hub.mode (subscribe or unsubscribe), hub.topic (feed URL), and hub.callback (notification endpoint). On success, returns a 200 response confirming the subscription state change. Subscriptions enable real-time notifications when the feed is updated.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Added: authentication requirement (HTTP Basic Auth), required input fields from SubscriptionRequest schema, expected response behavior, and the side effect of enabling real-time notifications. This helps agents understand what parameters to provide and what state changes occur.

message: Operation 'querySubscriptions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are too vague about the three distinct operations and lack critical input/output details. Improved summary to be more concise and action-oriented. Enhanced description to: clarify authentication requirement, explain the role of hub.mode as the operation selector, mention the 12 parameters exist for filtering/control, specify the response type (SubscriptionListResponse), and help agents understand when to use each mode. This significantly improves AI agent interpretability for choosing between the three operation types.

data.current_summary: List subscriptions, retrieve feed entries, or replay notifications
data.current_description: List current subscriptions, retrieve past feed entries, or replay notifications depending on the hub.mode parameter.
data.summary_suggestion: Query subscriptions, entries, or replay notifications
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve subscription information, historical feed entries, or replay past notifications based on the hub.mode parameter. Requires authentication via HTTP Basic Auth. Supports 12 query parameters to filter and control results: hub.mode determines the operation type (list subscriptions, retrieve entries, or replay notifications), hub.topic specifies the feed URL, and additional parameters control pagination, filtering, and notification replay. Returns a SubscriptionListResponse containing matching subscriptions or feed entries depending on the mode.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too vague about the three distinct operations and lack critical input/output details. Improved summary to be more concise and action-oriented. Enhanced description to: clarify authentication requirement, explain the role of hub.mode as the operation selector, mention the 12 parameters exist for filtering/control, specify the response type (SubscriptionListResponse), and help agents understand when to use each mode. This significantly improves AI agent interpretability for choosing between the three operation types.
